calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Jackson, Esq. 707-318-2994 for Plaintiff.
Edna Lepe, 415-613-2340 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant reports the Sheriff is not holding any amount. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in the hallwayto agree on a monthly payment.

10:21 The matter is recalled. Counsel informs the Court, parties have agreed to $62 a month towards the payment of the debt. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

EDNA LEPE'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (WAGE GARNISHMENT).

Denied. Judgment Debtor to pay $62.00 a month per agreement of the parties as staed on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
